coinopai.name: CoinOpAI
coinopai.description: Crypto intelligence API — Kronos signals, trade decisions, image generation. Paid per call via x402 USDC micropayments on Base.

products.name: Kronos Signals
products.description: Live directional signals for BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA from the Kronos model. Positive = bullish, negative = bearish.

products.name: Kronos Decision
products.description: Probabilistic trade decision — CONSIDER_LONG/SHORT/NO_ACTION with confidence and decision_id for auditing.

symbol.description: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, or ADA

products.name: Trade Preflight
products.description: Gate check before trading — market state, cooldown, regime, signal strength.

symbol.description: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, or ADA

products.name: Trade Audit
products.description: Verify a past trade decision against real prices. Returns verdict: GOOD_DECISION, BAD_DIRECTION, or NOISE.

products.name: Image Generation
products.description: AI image generation from text prompt. Returns a PNG URL. $0.10/image.

gumroad.name: Gumroad
gumroad.description: Digital product marketplace — courses, tools, templates, ebooks sold by independent creators.

affiliate_config.commission_note: Commission set per-product by the creator — 30% is typical but varies

partnerstack.name: PartnerStack Programs
partnerstack.description: SaaS affiliate programs via PartnerStack — tools like Notion, Webflow, Monday.com, and hundreds of others.

affiliate_config.commission_note: Varies by program — typically 20-30% recurring for SaaS
